name: Lemon Rosemary Grilled Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all marinade ingredients in a bowl.
2. Place chicken breasts in a resealable plastic bag or container and pour the marinade over them.
3. Turn off the kitchen area to prevent spills.
4. Marinate for at least 8 hours, preferably overnight.
5. Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
6. Remove chicken from marinade, allowing excess to drip off.
7. Place chicken on the hot grill and cook for about 6-8 minutes per side, or until internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
8. Let the chicken rest for a few minutes before serving.
